UpdateHaVip.haVipId: The ID of the HA VIP (High Availability Virtual IP)
UpdateHaVip.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
UpdateHaVip.name: The name of the HA VIP
UpdateHaVip.description: The description of the HA VIP
